# BP-105 negative variant: a refresh token sets both flags and SameSite.
lang: go
file: BP-105-variant-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func issue(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{
		Name:     "refresh_token",
		Secure:   true,
		HttpOnly: true,
		SameSite: http.SameSiteLaxMode,
	})
}
